text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our junior year in the books, we welcome
the new one—a year in which the Classics begin.
And as for Mejiro Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Continuing with the latest Twinkle Series news,
here's a new name for you to remember!

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text: She's a daughter of the Mejiro Family and a star on the rise, it's Mejiro Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text: Debuting only last year, Mejiro Ardan happens to be the younger sister of the Mejiro Ramonu!

text_block_list.name: Announcer B
text_block_list.text: Hooooo boy, with a living legend like her in the family, every race she runs must come with a whole heap of pressure. I bet lots of fans are hoping to see her follow in her sister's footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
It would seem so. Predictions of how close she'll
come to matching Mejiro Ramonu's achievements
are already trending on social media.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pardon me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Happy New Year to you, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I looking forward to working alongside you this
year as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I see you were watching television. May I
ask—

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: That's a tall order if you ask me. She did win the first ever Triple Tiara, after all. Nothing short of excellence can even hope to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Please don't mind me. I'm quite used to
being compared to my sister, and I've been
expecting to hear comments like those.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Besides, it's entirely true that I'm not shining as
brightly as she did.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not yet, at least. I've no intention of resigning
myself to the present status quo.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm determined to forge my own path and push
ahead so that my light can reach the hearts and
minds of the many.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, it's thanks to you that I was able to
experience so many special moments during my
junior year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of what anyone might say, I am proud
of the path I've taken thus far. As such...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Please don't pay such matters any mind, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Um, despite what I just said, may I have a quick
word?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: There's something I wish to tell you regarding my—no, our venture into classic year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I have a certain goal in mind for the year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Although... it won't come into view for a little
longer, so I feel that sharing the details this soon
may be somewhat presumptuous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such, I'd like to wait until the spring Classics
are closer before I make any commitments. If I've
achieved good enough fitness and experience to
attempt a G1...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Might I trouble you then for some advice?
choice_data_list: ...You're setting a goal for the future?
...You're setting a goal for the future?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Does it sound odd, coming from me? I thought it
might. I speak so often of "the now" and "the
moment" that touching upon the future so
suddenly must be—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's commitment to focusing
exclusively on the moment is the source of her
strength. I know that better than anyone. But
still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's only looking a little further
ahead, part of me is happy to hear her talk about
the future.
choice_data_list: I look forward to the day we discuss it further.
I look forward to the day we discuss it further.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Hearing you say that makes me very happy.
Until that day, please continue to guide me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go on to review her upcoming training
regimen. Then, while taking a break after
finishing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Do you have a little time to spare?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I have a minor request to make...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time we've seen each other this
year. Shall we mark the occasion with a seasonally
appropriate activity?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I usually spend New Year's with the younger
Mejiro children, but I think I'd like to try
something different this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Assuming that's all right with you, Trainer... What
do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never expected an invitation like this, but a
break from the usual routine might be good for
her. In terms of activities, New Year's is the time
for...
choice_data_list: Playing pin the nose on the snowman.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Pin the nose on the snowman!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderful idea, Trainer! Do you have the
necessary materials in your office?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...As embarrassing as it is to admit, I've spent a
great deal of time by myself over the years, so I
haven't had many opportunities to play games
with others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's why... I'm quite elated to receive an
invitation to play a game...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Was my reaction improper?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is always so even-keeled that I can't
help but smile after seeing such a rare, giddy grin
on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fetch the game set out from the closet in my
office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Right... This must be the nose. Which means that
goes here... and the eyes go there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...All right. Finished!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to a normal face, Mejiro Ardan's
creation... looks more like a unique take on
cubism.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pffft! Hehe! I wasn't even close!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This is much harder than it appears.
Right. It's your turn now, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Show me how it is done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Ardan and I start the year with
some lighthearted laughs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm partial to mochi soup myself. And though
New Year's Day has come and gone, I can't think
of another activity more appropriate for this time
of year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the cafeteria will have several kinds of
New Year's dishes available for a limited time.
Eating there is an option, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Would you allow me to... cook some mochi soup
for you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I thought that preparing you some mochi soup
using the Mejiro family recipe might be a nice way
to show how much I appreciate all your hard
work.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Nanny has taught me the basics, so I assure you I
won't be serving anything inedible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her request catches me off guard. But at this
moment, that's what she wants to do, and as her
trainer, I can't ignore that.
choice_data_list: I think I'll take you up on that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...! Thank you very much. I shall begin preparing
right away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan heads to the cafeteria to gather the
ingredients together, then gets to work in the
kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your patience. Your meal is ready.
Do help yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She serves a bowl of hardy soup filled with fish
and veggies. The aroma of the soy-based broth
makes my mouth water.
choice_data_list: Thanks! I can't wait to taste it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chunkier ingredients have been cut up neatly
and the mochi cakes are a perfect golden hue.
Mejiro Ardan's attention to detail is on full
display. It's just that...
choice_data_list: (...I think the flavor might be a little weak.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not that it tastes bad. The flavor is subtle and
nutritious. I just can't help feeling like it's a little
plain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Was the flavor on the weak side?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You needn't withhold criticism, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I sincerely apologize for this. It appears that my
bad habit has resurfaced.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
For whatever reason... I tend to end up making
dishes that lack flavor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps my palate has grown accustomed to
weaker flavors due to my long hospital stays, and
that comes out in my cooking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My older sister teased me about it actually. She
said my cooking tasted like the hospital cafeteria
food she used to eat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...It seems I've wasted my opportunity to cook for
you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This mochi soup has shown me a new side of
Mejiro Ardan. For me, that alone means...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This taste represents one of the countless
"moments" Mejiro Ardan has experienced. There's
no way it could be anything other than delicious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...You truly are a kind person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, while eating mochi soup together, we
chat cheerfully about random stuff and enjoy a
laid-back start to the new year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Flying a kite!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderful suggestion! Let's absolutely do
that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The truth is... I've never flown a kite before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was rarely able to play outside during my youth,
so I often daydreamed about flying the kites I saw
bobbing about in the distant sky.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But the years kept passing by without an
opportunity ever presenting itself. That is, until
today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...! Yes, let's!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After pulling a kite out of storage, we head down
to a park just around the corner from the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. My heart's racing. Perhaps I'll have a knack
for flying kites.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Hi there! Are you gonna fly a kite too?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Come join us! We're kite-flying pros!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Thank you so much for the invitation. This
is my first time at the helm of a kite, actually.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: For real?! Here, we'll show you what to do!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Okay, first you need to choose who's gonna hold
the kite and who's gonna fly it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We've done it, Trainer! Our kite is airborne!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Nice! Now it's our turn!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Let's see whose kite goes the highest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Mejiro Ardan flying a kite so innocently
alongside these kids warms my heart. What a nice
way to start the new year...
